svg.title: Station as Industrial Machine — Cohesive Ring
svg.desc: 2D flatland station. Everything is on the plane. Modules fill their ring arc segments. Corridors are structural plating. Solar arrays extend starward (toward center). You can read the industrial flow: ore in → smelt → product out.
svg.text: Modules fill arc segments. Corridors are structure. Solar extends starward. Flow is readable.
star is at center (where you are)
Ring plating is continuous structure, not faint arcs. Modules fill their arc segment.
Solar arrays extend inward toward star. Dock is a gap, not a shape. Flow is readable.
Furnace has intake, firebox, output. Hopper has mouth facing outward. Repair has arm.
Ring 2 connected by structural spokes with cross-bracing. Scaffolds show planned expansion.
Compatible with existing ring/slot system. Modules just render as full arc segments instead of icons.
